title: Persona Metrics — participation.jsonl row
description: One row per persona that ran at this stage, regardless of whether the persona raised any findings. Distinguishes silent personas (ran but raised nothing) from failed personas (didn't run / errored).

persona.description: Persona name as referenced in personas/<stage>/<persona>.md (or 'codex-adversary' for Codex).

model.description: Model id used for this persona's run (e.g. 'claude-opus-4-7', 'codex').

findings_emitted.description: Number of findings.jsonl rows where this persona appears in personas[]. Computed at emit time.

status.description: ok = persona ran successfully (with or without findings). failed = persona dispatch errored. timeout = persona didn't return within budget. Only 'ok' rows count toward silent_rate denominator.
